incident_summary.description: Suspected APT attack with credential theft and lateral movement

chain_of_custody.action: Incident created and evidence collection initiated
Evidence collected: text - Memory dump analysis - Volatility results
Evidence collected: text - Network traffic analysis - PCAP results
Evidence collected: logs - System event logs - Windows & Sysmon

Incident closed. Summary: APT attack confirmed. Credential theft via Mimikatz, C2 communication to 203.0.113.50, and data exfiltration detected. All evidence collected and preserved with full chain of custody.
